source_pr.title: plan: first step of join auto-select.
source_pr.body:
We consider different types of join execution in cbo framework. But we should still refine the cost calculation in the near future.

@zimulala @winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t t1 join t t2 on t1.a = t2.a order by t1.a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
